content:
ITEM 6. Selected Financial Data
(in millions, except per share data)
(1)Fiscal [DATE_TIME] results include the impact of [PERSON] (estimated at approximately [SALARY] per diluted share), goodwill and intangible asset impairments at our International Channels business ([SALARY] per diluted share), amortization expense related to recognition of TFCF and Hulu intangible assets and fair value step-up on film and television costs ([SALARY] per diluted share), a non-cash gain to adjust our investment in DraftKings, Inc. to fair value (DraftKings gain) ([SALARY] per diluted share) and restructuring and impairment charges ([SALARY] per diluted share). At [DATE_TIME], the Company adopted new lease accounting guidance increasing total assets and liabilities by approximately [SALARY].7 billion.
(2)On [DATE_TIME], the Company acquired TFCF for cash and Disney shares (see Note 4 to the Consolidated Financial Statements). [PERSON] and Hulu’s financial results have been consolidated since the date of acquisition. The acquisition had a number of impacts on [DATE_TIME] results, the most significant of which were a non-cash gain from remeasuring our initial 30% interest in Hulu to fair value ([SALARY] per diluted share), amortization expense related to recognition of TFCF and Hulu intangible assets and fair value step-up on film and television costs ([SALARY] per diluted share), restructuring and impairment charges ([SALARY] per diluted share), an adverse impact from TFCF and Hulu operating results ([SALARY] per diluted share) and a charge for the extinguishment of a portion of the debt originally assumed in the TFCF acquisition ([SALARY] per diluted share). [DATE_TIME] results also reflected equity investment impairments ([SALARY] per diluted share). Cash provided by continuing operating activities reflected payments for tax obligations that arose from the spin-off of Fox Corporation in connection with the TFCF acquisition and the sale of the Regional Sports Networks (RSN) acquired with TFCF ([SALARY].6 billion). Cash used in continuing investing activities reflected a cash payment of [SALARY].7 billion paid to acquire TFCF, offset by [SALARY].7 billion in cash and cash equivalents assumed in the TFCF acquisition.
(3)Fiscal [DATE_TIME] results include a net benefit from the Tax Act Deferred Remeasurement, net of the Deemed Repatriation Tax ([SALARY] per diluted share) and the Tax Act reduction in [DATE_TIME] [LOCATION] federal statutory income tax rate ([SALARY] per diluted share) (see Note 10 to the Consolidated Financial Statements). In addition, [DATE_TIME] included gains on the sales of real estate and property rights ([SALARY] per diluted share) and an adverse impact from equity investment impairments ([SALARY] per diluted share).
(4)Fiscal [DATE_TIME] results include a non-cash net gain in connection with the acquisition of a controlling interest in BAMTech ([SALARY] per diluted share).
(5)Fiscal [DATE_TIME] results include the Company’s share of a net gain recognized by A+E in connection with an acquisition of an interest in Vice ([SALARY] per diluted share).
ITEM 7.
